name: Curried Corn Salad
recipeIngredient: Spinach leaves (I didn't have any, used red leaf lettuce instead)
1 teaspoon curry spices (turmeric, cumin, coriander, mixed)
Tabasco or cayenne pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dressing and pour over salad.
2. Allow the mixture to marinate for a few minutes.
